summary: Implemented mock transport layer with full abstraction. Transport ABC defines request(method,url,headers,body)->(status,headers,body). MockTransport supports three modes (always_success, always_fail, realistic) plus per-route overrides. Predefined responses cover all endpoints (auth, user-info, messaging, calendar) with success, auth failure (401), rate limit (429), server error (500), and param error (400) scenarios. MockHttpClient adapter integrates with AuthManager; MockUrllibAdapter patches urllib for FeishuClient. All tests pass with zero real HTTP requests.
